item.title: 2026 Global Human Capital Trends
item.description: Article • 9-min read • Our 2026 survey reveals a shift from tensions to tipping points. What intentional choices can organizations make to adapt continuously, move with speed, and lead with a human edge?
item.content:encoded:
Article • 9-min read

Our 2026 survey reveals a shift from tensions to tipping points. What intentional choices can organizations make to adapt continuously, move with speed, and lead with a human edge?

item.title: Flight or fold: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey
item.description: Article • 3-min read • Deloitte's 2026 Summer Travel Survey finds that rising travel costs are reshaping summer plans, sidelining some travelers while pushing determined vacationers to spend more to get away.
item.content:encoded:
Article • 3-min read

Deloitte's 2026 Summer Travel Survey finds that rising travel costs are reshaping summer plans, sidelining some travelers while pushing determined vacationers to spend more to get away.

item.title: When frontier AI models outpace cyber remediation: Banking's new security challenge
item.description: Article • 6-min read • AI has accelerated banks’ ability to identify cybersecurity vulnerabilities. Here are four ways to mitigate cyber threats at machine speed.
item.content:encoded:
Article • 6-min read

item.title: What skills might boards need as tectonic shifts reshape the business landscape?

item.content:encoded:
Article • 2-min read

item.title: Business and IT leaders report AI agents are scaling faster than their guardrails

item.content:encoded:
Article • 2-min read

item.title: Rethinking skills-based talent models: 4 paths to business value

item.content:encoded:
Article • 15-min read

item.title: 2026 Digital Media Trends: Capturing always-on fandom between releases and seasons
